title: Review Medication Review contradiction invalidation candidates
description:
Review split-score contradiction exemplars after the April 22 rubric/code promotion and determine which older feedback items should be invalidated under the current Medication Review rubric.

In scope:
- Medication Review: Prescriber
- Medication Review: Dosage
- Medication Review: Pharmacy
- Medication Review: Individual Confirmation

Focus:
- older labels that require all medications instead of most
- older labels that count excluded/discontinued/not-current meds
- older labels that apply SRX rules to SPM calls
- pharmacy labels that accept vague or system-only pharmacy verification despite the published current-pharmacy rubric

Do not invalidate automatically; prepare and review candidate lists first.

Invalidated exactly these item external IDs and feedback item IDs: 306181806 (71febae1-9a45-4d58-a19b-bf31d810ca58), 305252079 (9f1f8fab-0a02-42d0-893a-697625b3cdf7), 305141717 (f2d731f8-f411-4d30-b896-3a05f28c6f7a), 305262577 (e3c7d333-4c9a-42dd-bbe6-650ce23d36b5), and 305252085 (fb01a831-745c-4147-abb1-2d21c81bb485). Per-item invalidation succeeded by running the raw mutation with those existing fields included.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Rerunning the Medication Review: Prescriber contradictions report after the first approved invalidation batch and comparing it to the most recent pre-invalidation contradictions report. Goal: verify how the contradiction counts and exemplar set changed after invalidating the old all-meds Prescriber labels.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Reran Medication Review: Prescriber contradictions after the first approved invalidation batch and compared the fresh report against the latest true pre-invalidation report. Fresh post-invalidation report: 8d2253ea-f590-414e-9ede-b01aa11b9ac8 created 2026-04-22 18:50 UTC. Latest pre-invalidation baseline: b509fc02-1b39-45b0-a59f-e868a7319566 created 2026-04-22 18:11 UTC. Before: 54 analyzed, 10 contradictions, 44 aligned. After: 49 analyzed, 7 contradictions, 42 aligned. The five invalidated Prescriber items are fully absent from the fresh contradiction set: 306181806, 305252079, 305141717, 305262577, 305252085. Remaining contradiction set is now: 305141718, 305879339, 305881523, 305930388, 307498132, 307516904, 309504278. Net effect: contradiction rate dropped from 10/54 (18.5 percent) to 7/49 (14.3 percent). Two contradictions surfaced in the fresh selected set that were not in the 18:11 report exemplar list: 305141718 and 309504278. This appears to be normal post-invalidation resurfacing from the remaining eligible pool rather than a failure of the invalidation batch.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Ran post-fix feedback evaluation for Medication Review: Prescriber (eval 7ccfb878-ef0c-43f7-ac4d-5ef326951a10) and verified invalidated feedback IDs are excluded (intersection count 0 against the 5 invalidated IDs).

comments.author: ryan

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting Prescriber optimizer to 20 cycles after contradiction cleanup. Will also update the canonical optimizer skill with the conservative contradiction-invalidation workflow used here, then begin the same process on the next Medication Review score.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Beginning the same contradictions-report plus fresh-evaluation triage for Medication Review: Dosage, since it uses the same threshold-style SRX rubric (two or more misses => No; no more than one miss => Yes).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Prescriber optimizer relaunched successfully via direct CLI using /Users/ryan/miniconda3/bin/python after earlier SCORE_NOT_FOUND failure on explicit start_version pull. New procedure: 9029e3b7-1890-4e38-8909-330337b3803f. Also started Medication Review: Dosage contradiction triage with fresh 180-day contradictions report + eval 30533ae5-eae0-4c96-8917-ebe457d2b6e5. Clean initial invalidation shortlist is currently: a2032807-0f2a-431a-878e-116af9c82bfe, a3a6640c-f1fe-46ae-ad17-1caa662ddf42, 8b777a9b-29ff-448a-ae57-b19978ee30c5, 22ce6344-d998-43a3-90f4-0030f24f5f47. Important separate finding: Dosage champion still has parse_from_start=true and guidelines missing, and several false negatives appear to be parser/config artifacts rather than contradictory labels.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Continuing with Dosage before launching its optimizer. Rationale: post-invalidation contradiction count improved (14 -> 9), but the live Dosage champion still shows a real config problem (parse_from_start=true and missing published guidelines on the champion version), so optimization would currently learn from parser/config noise. Next step is to fix Dosage code+guidelines together, verify via evaluation, then start the Dosage optimizer on the cleaned signal.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Prescriber optimizer startup bug fixed via CLI score-pull resolver patch. Current clean run: procedure 75231fc3-823a-4654-8192-ecc016f6b8d1. Also updated RCA handling to avoid false missing-context clustering and documented conservative contradiction-driven invalidation workflow in skills/plexus-score-optimizer/SKILL.md.
